headline: Why Beauty Remains One of Target's Strongest Growth Engines
summary: Target's beauty category keeps powering growth, with sales up 9.6% in Q1 and Beauty Studio set to expand across 600-plus stores.

headline: Can AI Search Become Costco's Next Digital Growth Driver?
summary: Costco refines product pages for AI search as early traffic triples, converts best and supports a fast-growing digital channel.
